title: rosa sempervirens f. prostrata
intro: Rosa sempervirens f. prostrata is a trailing or creeping evergreen rose species, a type of groundcover, characterized by its woody stems and dark green leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, derived from its flavonoids and phenolic acids. Rosa sempervirens f. prostrata has been traditionally used to promote health and well-being, with potential health benefits including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rosa sempervirens f. prostrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in skincare products and perfumes due to its fragrant flowers and antiseptic properties.
